title: Form node error with JSON-defined date field
symptom: When submitting a form with a date field defined in JSON, n8n throws an error stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length')'. This occurs only when using the JSON option for defining fields.
root_cause: The error occurs because the Form node expects a 'formatDate' field when a date field is defined in JSON. If this field is not provided, it leads to an attempt to read properties of an undefined variable, resulting in the error.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 1.122.0 or later
Ensure the date field in JSON includes a 'formatDate' property
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 1.122.0 or later and modify the JSON to include 'formatDate' for the date field.
